title: Agent timeout configuration
description: Add per-agent max execution time in frontmatter (e.g. timeout: 600). Currently runClaude has no ceiling — long pentests or bad prompts can hang forever.
notes: DONE — merged PR #1.

title: Kali VM SSH integration
description: Add KALI_VM_HOST/USER/KEY to env and update pentester agent prompt to know it can SSH in. Document Kali VM setup (UTM/VMware) in README.
notes: DONE — merged PR #2.

title: Per-agent Slack channel routing
description: Allow agent definitions to specify a default Slack channel to post results to. Useful for scheduled agents (marketing report → #marketing).
notes: DONE — schedules have per-schedule slack_channel field. Scheduled runs post results as threads to the configured channel.

title: Thread-aware @mentions
description: When someone @mentions Winston inside an existing thread that has a session the bot should resume that session rather than starting fresh.
notes: DONE — merged PR #3.

title: Docker Kali sidecar
description: Run a persistent Kali container alongside Winston for light recon and scripted scans. Claude execs in via docker exec. Faster than VM for non-destructive work.
notes: Complement to VM — not a replacement. VM for exploits; Docker for recon.

title: Agent result streaming
description: Stream Claude output token-by-token back to Slack as the agent thinks rather than posting the full result at the end. Use Slack message update API to edit the thinking... message in place.
notes: DONE — merged PR #4. Uses StreamingSlackUpdater with mutex-protected message updates.

title: Web dashboard chat persistence
description: Store chat history in localStorage or a simple SQLite file so conversation history survives page refreshes. Currently the dashboard chat is ephemeral.
notes: Simple: serialize session ID + messages to localStorage.

title: Multi-turn voice conversations
description: After a voice response plays back automatically record the next question (push-to-talk or VAD). Currently voice is single-turn request/response.
notes: Requires WebRTC or MediaRecorder + VAD library in the browser.

title: Agent chaining / delegation
description: Let Winston orchestrate other agents in sequence — e.g. youtube agent finds topics then hands off to marketing agent to write promotional copy. Implement as a tool call or structured output protocol.
notes: This is the real power of an orchestrator pattern.

title: Scheduled agent results digest
description: Add a weekly digest mode: collect all scheduled agent outputs from the week and have Winston summarize them into a single Slack message.
notes: Cron: 0 9 * * 1 running a meta-prompt against stored outputs.

title: Slack DM support
description: Allow Winston to receive and respond to direct messages not just channel commands. Some users prefer DMs for sensitive queries.
notes: Requires message.im event subscription.

title: Agent health / last-run dashboard
description: Show each agent's last run time status (success/error) and response time on the dashboard home page. Read from audit log or add a runs table.
notes: Makes it easy to spot a broken agent or hanging schedule.

title: Secrets manager integration
description: Pull secrets from macOS Keychain or 1Password CLI instead of .env file. Eliminates the risk of accidentally committing credentials and makes rotation easier.
notes: op read op://vault/item/field for 1Password; security find-generic-password for Keychain.

title: Rate limit per Slack user
description: Current rate limiting is per IP. Since all Slack webhooks come from Slack's IPs this is effectively global. Add per-user_id rate limiting using the Slack user_id in the webhook payload.
notes: Prevents one user from hammering the system in a shared workspace.

title: Agent versioning / rollback
description: Store agent .md file snapshots with timestamps so you can roll back a prompt change if an agent starts behaving worse after an edit.
notes: Git blame on ~/.claude/agents/ is a reasonable MVP.

title: Structured output formatting
description: Add a flag or frontmatter option (output: markdown|table|json) so agents format their Slack responses consistently. Currently formatting is ad-hoc.
notes: Slack renders mrkdwn — tables and code blocks look great.

title: Image output in Slack
description: When an agent generates an image (e.g. Nano Banana thumbnail) upload it directly to Slack via files.upload API rather than posting a URL.
notes: Requires files:write scope.

title: MCP server auto-discovery
description: Scan ~/.claude/mcp*.json or a config file and surface available MCP tools to each agent at spawn time. Let agent frontmatter declare which MCPs to enable.
notes: Powerful but complex. Claude CLI already handles MCP if configured globally.

title: Conversation export
description: Add an Export button to the web dashboard chat that downloads the conversation as a Markdown or PDF file.
notes: Simple: serialize messages array to Markdown.

title: Linux systemd service generator
description: Add a make install-services target that writes and loads launchd plists (macOS) or systemd units (Linux) automatically using the current path and .env values.
notes: DONE — merged PR #5.

title: Cloudflare tunnel auto-start
description: Add a launchd plist / systemd unit for cloudflared tunnel run to the service generator. Currently users have to start it manually or set it up separately.
notes: cloudflared has its own install-as-service command: cloudflared service install.

title: Agent marketplace / sharing
description: A format and repository for sharing agent .md definitions. Someone builds a great researcher agent — they push it to a registry and others can install it with one command.
notes: GitHub repo + a CLI installer is the simplest version.

title: Pentester report generation
description: After a pentest session have the pentester agent auto-generate a structured report (scope findings severity recommendations) and post it to Slack or save to a file.
notes: Prompt engineering + a report template in the agent system prompt.

title: Wake-on-LAN support
description: If Winston is running on a machine that sleeps add a wake-on-LAN trigger so it auto-wakes when a Slack command arrives. Cloudflare Worker can act as the WoL proxy.
notes: Niche but useful for home lab setups.

title: Budget / usage tracking
description: Log each Claude invocation with model and approximate token count. Surface a weekly usage summary so you know which agents are heaviest and can optimize prompts or model choices.
notes: Claude CLI --output-format json includes token counts in the response.

title: Test suite + CI/CD pipeline
description: Unit/integration/security tests for all packages. GitHub Actions with 5 jobs: Go tests with race detector and coverage threshold; build verification; security checks; golangci-lint; frontend build.
notes: DONE — 58 tests passing. make test / make test-security / make test-cover.

title: Session persistence
description: Persist agent sessions to disk so thread conversations survive router restarts. Currently sessions are in-memory only.
notes: DONE — sessions saved to ~/.config/winston/sessions.json. Restored on startup. Stubs stored before run.

title: Schedule persistence
description: Persist scheduled agent runs to disk so they survive router restarts. Currently schedules are in-memory only.
notes: DONE — schedules saved to ~/.config/winston/schedules.json. Loaded on startup with cron re-registration.

title: Threaded scheduled runs
description: Scheduled agent runs should post results as Slack threads so the owner can reply and continue the conversation. Tag the owner for notifications.
notes: DONE — uses PostMessageTS for trigger message then SpawnAgentInThreadStreaming for threaded reply. Tags @owner.

title: Schedule editing
description: Allow editing existing schedules (cron prompt timezone agent) from the web UI and API instead of delete-and-recreate.
notes: DONE — PUT /schedules/{id} with partial updates. Web UI has inline editor with parseCron() reverse-parsing.

title: Google Calendar sync
description: Sync scheduled agent runs to Google Calendar as recurring events so they appear alongside your regular calendar.
notes: DONE — POST /schedules/sync-calendar spawns winston agent with Google Workspace MCP to create/update events.

title: Runtime model switching
description: Change an agent's Claude model (opus/sonnet/haiku) from the web UI without editing files. Show full model versions.
notes: DONE — model switcher on agent chat page. Shows Opus 4.6 / Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5. Triggers restart + Slack notification.

title: Runtime prompt editing
description: Edit agent system prompts from the web dashboard with markdown preview. No need to SSH into the machine.
notes: DONE — inline editor with markdown preview on dashboard. PUT /api/agents/{agent}/prompt endpoint.

title: Workspace navigation
description: Group agents by workspace prefix on the dashboard with a filterable dropdown and color-coded workspace avatars.
notes: DONE — agents with hyphenated names auto-group. Dropdown with colored initials and checkmarks.

title: Tool icon library
description: Auto-detect tools from agent system prompts and display inline SVG icons (Git Figma Slack YouTube Google etc.) on agent cards with clickable overflow.
notes: DONE — 17 tool icons with stroke/fill distinction. ToolOverflow popover for +N hidden tools.

title: Glass morphism UI redesign
description: Redesign the web dashboard with a dark glass-morphism design language: ambient orbs noise texture glass cards gradient text custom scrollbar.
notes: DONE — full redesign across all pages (home schedules voice agent-chat). Design token system in globals.css.
